scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @opening/api" "npm run dev -w @opening/web" "npm run dev -w @opening/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @opening/shared && npm run build -w @opening/api && npm run build -w @opening/web && npm run build -w @opening/admin && npm run build:weapp -w @opening/mini
